name: 反应类型
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 反应与化学计量 / Reactions & Stoichiometry / Reactions & Stoichiometry
curriculum_points: HS-PS1-2: Construct and revise an explanation for the outcome of a simple chemical reaction based on the outermost electron states of atoms, trends in the periodic table, and knowledge of the patterns of chemical properties.

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「反应类型」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-PS1-2: Construct and revise an explanation for the outcome of a simple chemical reaction based on the outermost elect…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。
